final:
module top_module(
    input in,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg out
    );always @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n) begin
        if (~rst_n) begin
            out <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            out <= in;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
